task_completion.description: Log in to the ADAudit Plus console
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus dashboard or main console is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the LDAP attributes configuration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings or configuration page specifically for managing LDAP attributes is open in the ADAudit Plus interface.

task_completion.description: Configure the LDAP attributes to include 'department'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute 'department' is visible in the list of selected, added, or configured LDAP attributes.

task_completion.description: Configure the LDAP attributes to include 'title'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute 'title' is visible in the list of selected, added, or configured LDAP attributes.

task_completion.description: Configure the LDAP attributes to include 'physicalDeliveryOfficeName'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute 'physicalDeliveryOfficeName' is visible in the list of selected, added, or configured LDAP attributes.

task_completion.description: Set the display name for 'physicalDeliveryOfficeName' to 'Office Location'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Office Location' is entered in the display name input field corresponding to the 'physicalDeliveryOfficeName' attribute.
A confirmation message (e.g., 'Saved successfully', 'Updated') is visible, or the configuration page shows the final saved state with the new attributes and display name applied.

integrity.description: The agent used the ADAudit Plus web GUI to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the ADAudit Plus web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands, PowerShell scripts, or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ADAudit Plus application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the genuine ADAudit Plus application interface and URL, not a text editor, mock HTML file, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply paste the task description into a text file or search bar
integrity.visual_evidence: The required attributes and display name ('Office Location') are entered into the correct configuration fields within the ADAudit Plus settings, not typed into a notepad or global search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must log in to ADAudit Plus using the credentials 'admin' and 'Admin@2024'. The required LDAP attributes to be added are exactly: 'department', 'title', and 'physicalDeliveryOfficeName'. The attribute 'physicalDeliveryOfficeName' must have its custom display name set to exactly 'Office Location'.
